title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Latest Trends
Waste-based biofuels could be a key driver of the energy transition transforming today's limited supply of low-carbon transportation fuels and creating a local, circular economy, according to a new report by research and consultancy group Wood Mackenzie. Read More

The Fed is still ‘The only game in town' for markets
Frank Herbert's ‘ Dune ', one of the most epic sci-fi novels of all time (and the subject of a less-great 1984 Kyle MacLachlan movie ), featured, amongst other things, a mystical far-future sisterhood, called the Bene Gesserit. Read More

China's iron ore and coal imports were each able to climb on a m-o-m basis last month
China's iron ore and coal imports most recently were each able to climb on a month-on-month basis last month, but..

children.title: Is a long-awaited recovery in sight?
section_path: Is a long-awaited recovery in sight?
children.section_path_text: Is a long-awaited recovery in sight?
children.summary:
China's seaborne crude imports in August (days representing 1-18) have breached the 8mbd mark, up marginally from the 7.9mbd average seen in the past two months but remains 10% below last year's volumes. Read More
Image reference: grain+cargo.jpg | assets/2022-08-28_weekly-insights-review_img_grain2bcargo_e4b1d3174155.jpg

children.title: The majority of these grains are heading to China, Turkey, Indonesia, Egypt and Spain
section_path: The majority of these grains are heading to China, Turkey, Indonesia, Egypt and Spain
children.section_path_text: The majority of these grains are heading to China, Turkey, Indonesia, Egypt and Spain
children.summary: A total of 24 ships carrying 948,000 Mts of grain have now found their way out of war-torn Ukraine since the UN grain corridor was established on the 23rd of July.

children.title: Commodity markets pushed higher as ongoing supply shortages offset concerns of weaker demand
section_path: Commodity markets pushed higher as ongoing supply shortages offset concerns of weaker demand
children.section_path_text: Commodity markets pushed higher as ongoing supply shortages offset concerns of weaker demand
children.summary: A weaker USD also helped boost investor appetite for the sector.

children.title: Chinese Consumer Spending Showing Growth Spending had contracted on a year-on-year basis for three consecutive months
section_path: Chinese Consumer Spending Showing Growth Spending had contracted on a year-on-year basis for three consecutive months
children.section_path_text: Chinese Consumer Spending Showing Growth Spending had contracted on a year-on-year basis for three consecutive months
children.summary:
Consumer spending in China has now experienced year-on-year growth for two straight months, most recently rising by 2.7% in July. Read More

children.summary:
